= coherence (0 = full decoherence, 1 = perfect alignment with source).

= available coherence gap. Plain English: Coherence rises in proportion to your openness times the grace available, and falls in proportion to entropy times your current coherence. Steady-State Coherence
= Godhead, Measurement, Entropy, Specification, Time, Knowledge, Representation, Quantum state, Fidelity, Consciousness. Plain English: The series-wide coherence variable. The Free Will paper's
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
At equilibrium ($dC/dt = 0$), the steady-state coherence is: $C^* = \frac{O \cdot G}{O \cdot G + S}$

If unconditional election is true and the non-elect are left with $G = 0$ through no fault of their own — no prior defect in $O$ that caused God to withhold grace, since the election precedes any such defect — then what moral account do we give of the non-elect's damnation?
$$\chi = f(G, M, E, S, T, K, R, Q, F, C)$$

Logos Coupling The interaction architecture between the Logos field and a human will — how openness $O$ and surrender $s$ modulate the channel. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)
